text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...That sums it up quite nicely. What do<n>you think,
Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Umm... I must say it sounds... quite nice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: U-um, Rice... What did you... just say?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um... I am simply trying to... emulate<n>you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
D-do I really speak in such a manner?<n>Surely you
must be exaggerating.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
No. You always speak so politely... like a<n>princess
in a picture book.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Well. When you say that with such<n>sparkling
eyes, how can I tell you to<n>stop...
